description_long: This lamppost features a classic Victorian-inspired design with two lantern-style lamp heads branching symmetrically from a central ornate arm. The lamp heads are encased in glass panels with pointed tops and decorative finials, supported by a dark green and black metal structure. The central pole is adorned with intricate scrollwork beneath the lamps, adding an elegant touch to the overall appearance. The base is robust and fluted, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The materials appear to be primarily painted cast iron or steel, with glass for the lamp enclosures. This lamppost would be well-suited for placement along historic city streets, parks, or upscale urban neighborhoods.
description: A Victorian-style lamppost with two glass-paneled lantern heads, ornate scrollwork, and a sturdy fluted base in green and black metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lantern heads, ornate scrollwork, and the full decorative base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the two lamp heads and the slender profile of the pole.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both lantern heads and scrollwork visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lamp heads in profile and the narrowness of the structure.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian lantern style with pointed tops, glass panels, and decorative finials
